scripts.kill:start: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='C:\\Users\\neel8\\Desktop\\UrbanNest\\frontend'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*'+$p+'*') -and $_.CommandLine -like '*next\\dist\\server\\lib\\start-server.js*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }"
scripts.kill:dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='C:\\Users\\neel8\\Desktop\\UrbanNest\\frontend'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*'+$p+'*') -and $_.CommandLine -like '*next\\dist\\bin\\next* dev*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }"
scripts.dev: npm run kill:start && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{recursive:true,force:true})" && next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill:start && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{recursive:true,force:true})" && next dev -p 3000
